title: Aether No Nerf
description: Removes Weapons and Armor nerfs in the aether dimension
body:
⚔️ No Aether Nerfs 🌪️
Frustrated with your gear getting nerfed in the Aether dimension? With No Aether Nerfs, you can finally bring the full power of your armors and weapons from other dimensions into the Aether without restrictions! 🛡️💥

Features:
🚫 Removes all nerfs applied to armors and weapons from other dimensions when in the Aether.
💪 Keep your gear's full strength in the Aether for the ultimate experience.
🌍 Seamless compatibility with other dimension mods for a frustration-free adventure.
Explore the Aether at your full potential, no compromises! ☁️🗡️
